panels.title: 시나리오별 성공률 (박스 크기 = 실행 횟수, 색상 = 성공률)

targets.expr: sum by (suite_id, scenario_id) (gaia_scenario_success_count{suite_id=~".*_public_v2$",suite_id!="visit_korea_public_v2",model=~"$model"}) / sum by (suite_id, scenario_id) (gaia_scenario_runs_total{suite_id=~".*_public_v2$",suite_id!="visit_korea_public_v2",model=~"$model"})
